Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against Associated Insulation Of California, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kyle J. Clawson of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), appearing for moving party Fireman's Fund Insurance Company, the insurer of defendant Associated Insulation of California, Inc., a suspended corporation
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Michael Kell

RULING:
FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

At the Murphy (#274695) hearing the Court granted parties' request to also argue the same motions in the Kell (#275638), Lee (#275898), and Kase (#275958) cases. Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as to the Kell case: Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's motion to set aside entry of default and default judgment is granted. Fireman's Fund is allowed to bring said motion. (See Western Heritage Ins. Co. v. Superior Court (2011) 199 Cal.App.4th 1196.) The default entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on August 15, 2012 and the default judgment entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on January 16, 2014 are set aside pursuant to the court's inherent, equitable power to set aside a default on the ground of extrinsic fraud or mistake. Plaintiff's request for a continuance is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Angela Sinclair of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 13902 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Associated Insulation Of California
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: CAROL KAREN, CSR#8189. (514)

Briana E. McCarthy, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MICHAEL KELL.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiff MICHAEL KELL shall recover damages from defendant ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA in the amount of $50,000.00 in Economic Damages, $300,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, for a total amount of $350,000.00
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
